# C4 — AI Orchestration Engine

> C4 is an MCP-based orchestration system that automates project management from planning to completion. It provides 150+ tools for task management, code analysis, knowledge management, and distributed job execution.

## Components

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): Complete agent instructions and tool reference
- [C5 Hub](c5/): Distributed job queue server with lease-based work distribution

## MCP Tools (150+)

Core tools for AI agent orchestration:
- **Task Management**: add_todo, get_task, submit, claim, report, checkpoint
- **Code Analysis**: find_symbol, get_symbols_overview, find_file, search_for_pattern
- **Knowledge**: record, search, ingest, discover, publish, stats
- **Web Content**: web_fetch (markdown-first content retrieval)
- **Hub Integration**: job submit/status, DAG workflows, edge deployment
- **EventBus**: event publishing, rule management, WebSocket bridge

## Getting Started

1. Install: `cd c4-core && go build -o ~/.local/bin/cq ./cmd/c4/`
2. Configure: Create `.mcp.json` pointing to the cq binary
3. Use: MCP tools are available through any MCP-compatible AI agent
